contentList.content: Use your Axe and a Reaction Point to strike back when an enemy lands a Critical Hit on you.
From partially deciphering The Necromancy of Thay, you gain a damage bonus to your Necrotic spells, and a +[1] bonus to Wisdom Saving Throws and Ability Checks.
Use Necrotic Magic to paralyse a target.
+Paralyzing Touch, Eye of Vecna, Hall of Secrets; -Impotent Rage
+ Blighted Hands, Ravaging Retort, Enpowered Venom, Inoculated. -Ravaged, Plague Bringer.
Deal psychic damage to your attacker and nearby allies, breaking their minds.
Mass Charm, Blindsight, Devour Intellect, Psionic Retribution,
Summon Hornblade (levels 4 and 8 increase Strength); +1 to AC and saves if not wearing Heavy Armor; at level 3 cast Curse of Yondalla; disadvantage vs Small enemies.
Can steal gold during combat but may turn into gold; at level 4, summon a Golden Weapon from coins; you can set money on fire; advantage on dialogue with Traders; you cannot Disengage (ever).

1d6 Psychic damage to Aberrations; advantage on Vampiric Touch and Ray of Enfeeblement and Concentration; Vlaakith starts consuming you when you are below 20% health; -1 Constitution ever time that you are downed till Long Rest.
1d4 damage with Tridents; 1d4 Cold damage to enemies in Water; advantage on Gust of Wind; use Pearls to gain Darkvision; Disadvantage Wisdom.

Detect Thoughts and Good and Evil; Advantage on Command: Halt, Approach, Drop, and Hold Person; advantage and +2d4 damage to Oathbreakers; -5 and disadvantage to Deception; you are Cursed when dealing Necrotic damage with spells.

Use Orphrase stones to gain Luck of the Far Realms; gain Luck when not surrounded by allies; you can trigger Wild Surges when casting spells; can pull objects to you, but you may turn into gold if you fail; can be Disarmed on Critical Misses.
Elemental Weapon; poison your weapon when you heal; can go mad against targets with gold on them; -3 Insight.
Gain Wrath when dealing or taking damage; +1 dice to your Critical damage dealt; you take +2d4 Critical damage; -3 Deception and disadvantage vs Prone targets.
Sacrifice Intelligent Being spell; your melee attacks do 1d4 Thunder damage; on landing a critical hit, you may go insane for 2 turns.

Sacrifice Rubies for +2 Charisma; if you're a Bard, advantage Charisma; Male humanoids have disadvantage against your; Beasts won't attack you; you can cast Charm person on 4 targets, and have advantage on Command, Approach, and Enthrall. You are immune to Calm Emotions, are weak against the Enchanment school, and fall Prone after a Haste spell wears off.
+3d4 healing to Plants. Expertise Nature; Shapeshift to Wood Woad; Vulnerable to Fire, which you can send back against your attacker to Ensnare them.
Beckoning Darkness; Shadowstealth and Darkvision; take Psychic damage when failing a save against a spell.

Your Radiant damage can apply Holy Fire and create a Holy Fire surface; your healing spells apply Light; Light grants you +1 saves vs spells; Disadvantage to attacks and saving throws when Heavily Obscured.
Restore 1 of all base abilities once per rest; add Intelligence to Persuasion and Performance; Advantage Intelligence; -3 Religion, and no bonus action on the 1st turn of combat.
Extra level 1 spell slot; +1 to spell DC; +3 Arcana; you lose 1d4 health when healing others.
Incubate Death; Proficiency Glaives; Breath of Decay; Necrotic Resistance; your healing spells apply Wasting Mortal.
Smith's Strength spell; summon Spiritual Hammer; can upgrade Sussar and Adamantine items with Mithril Bars and a Hammer. Disadvantage Intelligence.
+3d4 healing to Beasts; Arrow of Salving once per day; add Dexterity to Animal Handling, Nature, and Medicine checks; -2 Persuasion and Performance.
Proficiency Longswords; Disguise Self; Fog Cloud when Dashing; Darkvision. Vulnerable Psychic damage; -1 to Spell saves when surrounded by allies.

Melee attacks apply Bleeding; 1d4 damage with Sickles; gain animal hides when killing beasts, which increase your AC by 1 when used (no stacking); you do 1d4 damage to Druids, and they have advantage vs you; on kills, you might turn into a bloodthirsty wild wolf.

When taking damage, add your Constitution modifer to the damage you deal; on taking a Critical Hit, gain temporary hit points; gain an extra action when your health is below 25%; disadvantage Persuasion and Medicine; bleed when you heal.
Summon Spider; Web (with advantage); cursed if killing a Spider; nearby allies have -1 Wisdom saves.
1d4 Radiant damage to Undead; advantage Charisma saves; +3 movement and 1 Action on first turn of combat, but -5 AC also.
Cast Net and Enslave; disadvantage Persuasion.
1d4 damage to Undead; Immune to Charm Person; on a kill, receive a Bloodstone, but possibly turn into a rabid Panther.
Expertise and advantage in History; advantage Wisdom checks; no Reaction point.

On taking damage, accumulate Martyrdom. 5 stacks allow you to cast Sacred Pain; -1 to all Physical damage and +1 Constitution when not wearing Armor; Advantage Constitution; you Bleed when dealing damage.
Can't take Critical Hits in Heavy armor; cannot be Surprised; add Intelligence to Perception checks; -1 Charisma.
+1d6 damage with Spears; Action Surge and See Invisibility on Kills; disadvantage Perception and Insight; One Eyed.
Enemies with metal weapons have -1d4 to attacks; Magic Weapon; 1d4 to attack and damage with Light Hammers; succesful Magic attacks against you cause you to become distracted.
Proficiency and 1d4 to attack with Battle Axes. Summon Spiritual Axe; Misty Escape. Disadvantage Concentration.
Dancing in the Moonlight spell; Sword master; Disadvantage vs targets with less than 10% health.
+3 Deception; Mirror Image (grants False Life); you are poisoned on Critical hits.
Add Wisdom to Performance checks; Instrument proficiency; 1d4 attack with Bows, Long and Shortswords; disadvantage vs Drow.
1d6 damage against bleeding targets; cast Bloodlust; on kills cause enemies to bleed; disadvantage Intelligence and Wisdom.
Opponents who miss you might drop their weapons and take Psychic camage. All allies near you might become drunk.
Add Intelligence modifier to Intimidation; can frighten enemies when making a kill; have advantage on Bane spell; nearby allies have disadvantage in Charisma.
13 Unarmored AC; advantage Insight and Persuasion; turn enemies into Sheep instead of killing them (once per combat).
Advantage Charisma and Intelligence; teleport; Gate; on critical hits, burst into flames and do 1d6 Fire and Acid damage to your attacker.
Pyschic Resistance, 1d4 damage to non Cultists, advantage vs Fear when surrounded by allies. Disadvantage Charisma and Intelligence saves.
The skin of a Beast, folded up neatly for future use.
Summon a Fiendish ally for 10 turns.
Make your foes easier to hit, and your allies harder to hit while they Dance in the Moonlight!
Unleash a cone of Necrotic damage that can apply Wasting Mortal for 2 turns.
Destroy the Undead. Banish a Fiend. Stun all others. Target must have less than 50 hitpoints.
The favored weapon of Yondalla. When it strikes, it glows silver.
Gain advantage on dialogue checks with Traders.
Waukeen is so generous, you can set your money on fire!
Attempt to damage an opponent based on how much gold they are carrying, and take some of it for yourself!
This creature is no longer Invisible.

Orprase was another name for pollucite, a gemstone especially favored by followers of Tymora. It was a medium-hard, brittle stone that was either colorless or faintly straw-yellow and found in otherwise uninteresting opaque rock samples.
Attempt to pull an object to you.
Failing your spell cast can damage the object!
If a target has 15 or more Intelligence, and 50 or less hitpoints, kill them instantly.
Regain 1 of all your base level spells and abilities.
Increase target's Strength by 2 for 10 turns.
At level 1 summon a Spider Familiar. At level 4, summon a Sword Spider. At level 7, summon a Phase Spider.
Take control of another Humanoid for three turns.
You bleed with compassion every time that you strike a foe.
Unleash your suffering in a burst of Holy light.
Apply Bloodlust to target: they can attack three times, and heal on a killing blow.
Your nearby allies have Disadvantage in Charisma.
